body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/common/city 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/common/city 
 ## 接口描述 
根据城市信息类型下载对应的城市信息。 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: GET  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":null}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"type","required":true,"maxLength":"50","label":"%E5%9F%8E%E5%B8%82%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"CITY_LIST_DOMESTIC","desc":"%20CITY_LIST_DOMESTIC%EF%BC%9A%E5%9B%BD%E5%86%85%E5%9F%8E%E5%B8%82%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8%EF%BC%9B%0ACITY_LIST_INTERNATIONAL%EF%BC%9A%E5%9B%BD%E9%99%85%E5%9F%8E%E5%B8%82%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8%EF%BC%9B%0ACITY_TREE_DOMESTIC%EF%BC%9A%E5%9B%BD%E5%86%85%E5%9F%8E%E5%B8%82%E6%A0%91%EF%BC%9B%0ACITY_TREE_INTERNATIONAL%EF%BC%9A%E5%9B%BD%E9%99%85%E5%9F%8E%E5%B8%82%E6%A0%91"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"FILE","name":"file","label":"%E5%9F%8E%E5%B8%82json%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ### 请求报文
```json
{BaseUrl}/v1/common/city/?type=CITY_LIST_INTERNATIONAL
```
### 响应报文
```json
以字节流文件形式返回，文件名：CITY_LIST_INTERNATIONAL.json
解析数据参考：
城市列表：
[
    {
        "canSelected": true,
        "cityPath": "CHN,1",
        "code": "1",
        "country": false,
        "countryCode": "CHN",
        "countryName": "中国",
        "countryNameEn": "CHINA",
        "dataSource": 0,
        "displayOrder": 1000,
        "domestic": true,
        "enable": true,
        "gangAoTai": false,
        "mainInfo2Output": "CHN,1|null|北京市|Beijing|中国|CHN|",
        "name": "北京市",
        "nameEn": "Beijing",
        "newCity": false,
        "parentCode": "CHN",
        "pathMatchCode": ",1,",
        "pathName": "北京市",
        "sourceCode": "110000",
        "type": "PROVINCE_LEVEL_CITY"
    }
	...
]
城市树：
{
    "children": [
        {
            "children": [
                ...
            ],
            "cityPath": "CHN",
            "code": "CHN",
            "countryName": "中国",
            "countryNameEn": "CHINA",
            "domestic": true,
            "name": "中国",
            "nameEn": "CHINA",
            "newCity": false,
            "pathName": "中国",
            "sourceCode": "CHN",
            "type": "COUNTRY"
        }
	...
    ],
    "cityPath": "CHN",
    "code": "CHN",
    "countryName": "中国",
    "countryNameEn": "CHINA",
    "domestic": true,
    "name": "中国",
    "nameEn": "CHINA",
    "newCity": false,
    "pathName": "中国",
    "sourceCode": "CHN",
    "type": "COUNTRY"
}
```
参数说明：
| 参数| 类型 | 名称 | 备注 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| code          | String            | 城市编号   |                |
| name          | String            | 城市名称       |            |
| nameEn        | String            | 城市英文名     |          |
| cityPath| String| 城市路径     |        |
| pathName      | String            | 路径名称       |         |
| type          | CityPlaceTypeEnum | 地址类型       | COUNTRY("国家"), PROVINCE("省"), PROVINCE_LEVEL_CITY("省级行政区、直辖市"), SPECIAL_ADMINISTRATIVE_REGION("特别行政区"), PREFECTURE_LEVEL_CITY("地级行政区、地级市"), COUNTY_LEVEL_CITY("区/县级行政区，区、县、县级市") |
| parentCode    | String            | 上级编码       |     |
| countryName   | String            | 国家名称       |       |
| countryNameEn | String            | 国家名称英文名 |      |
| countryCode   | String            | 国家编码       |     |
| enable        | boolean           | 是否启用中     |        |
| domestic| boolean           | 是否国内城市     |        |
| children| Array| 城市子节点列表    |        |  
## 错误码说明 
| 错误码| 错误信息|解决方案|
  | --- | --- | --- |
  | CITY_TYPE_NOT_EXIST| 城市类型文件信息不存在| 确认入参城市信息类型是否正确|
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/common/city

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/common/city

接口描述

根据城市信息类型下载对应的城市信息。

调用方式

METHOD: GET

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":null}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"type","required":true,"maxLength":"50","label":"%E5%9F%8E%E5%B8%82%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"CITY_LIST_DOMESTIC","desc":"%20CITY_LIST_DOMESTIC%EF%BC%9A%E5%9B%BD%E5%86%85%E5%9F%8E%E5%B8%82%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8%EF%BC%9B%0ACITY_LIST_INTERNATIONAL%EF%BC%9A%E5%9B%BD%E9%99%85%E5%9F%8E%E5%B8%82%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8%EF%BC%9B%0ACITY_TREE_DOMESTIC%EF%BC%9A%E5%9B%BD%E5%86%85%E5%9F%8E%E5%B8%82%E6%A0%91%EF%BC%9B%0ACITY_TREE_INTERNATIONAL%EF%BC%9A%E5%9B%BD%E9%99%85%E5%9F%8E%E5%B8%82%E6%A0%91"}}]}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"FILE","name":"file","label":"%E5%9F%8E%E5%B8%82json%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6"}}]}]}

接口调用示例

请求报文

  1. {BaseUrl}/v1/common/city/?type=CITY_LIST_INTERNATIONAL

响应报文

  1. 以字节流文件形式返回，文件名：CITY_LIST_INTERNATIONAL.json  

  2. 解析数据参考：  

  3. 城市列表：  

  4. [  

  5.     {  

  6.         "canSelected": true,  

  7.         "cityPath": "CHN,1",  

  8.         "code": "1",  

  9.         "country": false,  

  10.         "countryCode": "CHN",  

  11.         "countryName": "中国",  

  12.         "countryNameEn": "CHINA",  

  13.         "dataSource": 0,  

  14.         "displayOrder": 1000,  

  15.         "domestic": true,  

  16.         "enable": true,  

  17.         "gangAoTai": false,  

  18.         "mainInfo2Output": "CHN,1|null|北京市|Beijing|中国|CHN|",  

  19.         "name": "北京市",  

  20.         "nameEn": "Beijing",  

  21.         "newCity": false,  

  22.         "parentCode": "CHN",  

  23.         "pathMatchCode": ",1,",  

  24.         "pathName": "北京市",  

  25.         "sourceCode": "110000",  

  26.         "type": "PROVINCE_LEVEL_CITY"  

  27.     }  

  28. 	...  

  29. ]  

  30. 城市树：  

  31. {  

  32.     "children": [  

  33.         {  

  34.             "children": [  

  35.                 ...  

  36.             ],  

  37.             "cityPath": "CHN",  

  38.             "code": "CHN",  

  39.             "countryName": "中国",  

  40.             "countryNameEn": "CHINA",  

  41.             "domestic": true,  

  42.             "name": "中国",  

  43.             "nameEn": "CHINA",  

  44.             "newCity": false,  

  45.             "pathName": "中国",  

  46.             "sourceCode": "CHN",  

  47.             "type": "COUNTRY"  

  48.         }  

  49. 	...  

  50.     ],  

  51.     "cityPath": "CHN",  

  52.     "code": "CHN",  

  53.     "countryName": "中国",  

  54.     "countryNameEn": "CHINA",  

  55.     "domestic": true,  

  56.     "name": "中国",  

  57.     "nameEn": "CHINA",  

  58.     "newCity": false,  

  59.     "pathName": "中国",  

  60.     "sourceCode": "CHN",  

  61.     "type": "COUNTRY"  

  62. }

参数说明：

参数类型名称备注
codeString城市编号
nameString城市名称
nameEnString城市英文名
cityPathString城市路径
pathNameString路径名称
typeCityPlaceTypeEnum地址类型COUNTRY("国家"), PROVINCE("省"), PROVINCE_LEVEL_CITY("省级行政区、直辖市"), SPECIAL_ADMINISTRATIVE_REGION("特别行政区"), PREFECTURE_LEVEL_CITY("地级行政区、地级市"), COUNTY_LEVEL_CITY("区/县级行政区，区、县、县级市")
parentCodeString上级编码
countryNameString国家名称
countryNameEnString国家名称英文名
countryCodeString国家编码
enableboolean是否启用中
domesticboolean是否国内城市
childrenArray城市子节点列表

错误码说明

错误码错误信息解决方案
CITY_TYPE_NOT_EXIST城市类型文件信息不存在确认入参城市信息类型是否正确
